title: Adding negative numbers on the number line
description: Practice matching number line diagrams to addition expressions involving negative numbers.
topic_path: Adding negative numbers on the number line

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which number line model represents the expression $-2+\left(-\dfrac{7}{2}\right)$?**  


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's plot the addends one at a time.


[[☃ image 1]]


[[☃ image 1]]

The following number line model represents the expression $-2+\left(-\dfrac{7}{2}\right)$.  


[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A number line with 16 evenly spaced ticks from negative 9 to 6 in increments of 1. An arrow from 0 to negative 2 points 2 units to the left. Another arrow above it from negative 2 to negative 5.5 points 3.5 units to the left. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dbd202bd1050426aa1b4d97db9accf2b1ae8e149)

![A number line with 16 evenly spaced ticks from negative 9 to 6 in increments of 1. An arrow from 0 to negative 2 points 2 units to the left. Another arrow above it from negative 2 to 1.5 points 3.5 units to the right. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cea2625db5bf96bb5f5d9dde12bcd42c3a8ec8e9)

![A number line with 16 evenly spaced ticks from negative 9 to 6 in increments of 1. An arrow from 0 to 2 points 2 units to the right. Another arrow above it from 2 to negative 1.5 points 3.5 units to the left. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ad73ea8e6a304f60b69f838a328bc53a433d8a75)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which number line model represents the expression $\dfrac{5}{2} + 3$?** 


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's plot the addends one at a time.


[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]

The following number line model represents the expression $\dfrac{5}{2} + 3$.  

[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A vertical number line from 6 to negative 6 with evenly spaced tick marks. An arrow from 0 to 2.5 points 2.5 tick marks is on right of the number line goes upwards. Another arrow on right of this arrow from 2.5 to 5.5 points 3 tick marks goes upwards. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line. The number line reads from bottom to top: negative 6, negative 4, negative 2, 0, 2, 4 and 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1c40072d9c7d74cb576671a3f8f05cc63327727c)

![A vertical number line from 6 to negative 6 with evenly spaced tick marks. An arrow from 0 to negative 2.5 points 2.5 tick marks is on right of the number line and goes downwards. Another arrow on right of this arrow from negative 2.5 to negative 5.5 points 3 tick marks goes downwards. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line. The number line reads from bottom to top: negative 6, negative 4, negative 2, 0, 2, 4 and 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/db4757beff65c7c1888632412c3f3336d4195c9b)

![A vertical number line from 6 to negative 6 with evenly spaced tick marks. An arrow from 0 to negative 2.5 points 2.5 tick marks is on right of the number line and goes downwards. Another arrow on right of this arrow from negative 2.5 to 0.5 points 3 tick marks goes upwards. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line. The number line reads from bottom to top: negative 6, negative 4, negative 2, 0, 2, 4 and 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5a6541bb14bb4c6bd164a0e75b83fb114c2be37b)

choices.content: ![A vertical number line from 6 to negative 3 with evenly spaced tick marks in increments of 1. An arrow from 0 to negative 5 points 5 tick marks is on right of the number line and goes downwards. Another arrow on right of this arrow from negative 5 to negative 2.5 points 2.5 tick marks goes upwards. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line. The number line reads from bottom to top: negative 3, 0, 3, and 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/87fbf51f59922e0e84f0807e7a2efede9283e565)

![A vertical number line from 6 to negative 3 with evenly spaced tick marks in increments of 1. An arrow from 0 to 5 points 5 tick marks is on right of the number line goes upwards. Another arrow on right of this arrow from 5 to 7.5 points 2.5 tick marks goes upwards. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line. The number line reads from bottom to top: negative 3, 0, 3, and 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8a0b59745ee5a249ff6928b4e3b2db995ca03b2b)

![A vertical number line from 6 to negative 3 with evenly spaced tick marks. An arrow from 0 to 5 points 5 units upwards and is on right of the number line. Another arrow on right of this arrow from 5 to 2.5 points 2.5 units downwards. Dotted lines connect the end of the arrowheads to the respective points on the number line. The number line reads from bottom to top: negative 3, 0, 3, and 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4e621ca330c7acdb3e4b4da71b5bc7a350ab1be7)
